## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:
- Scope and non-goals:

## Validation

- [ ] Tests run locally (or justification provided)
- [ ] Lint/format checks pass
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or policy changed

## ADR Impact

- [ ] No ADR impact
- [ ] ADR updated
- [ ] New ADR added
- ADR reference(s):

## Migration Metadata (Only if Alembic revision is included)

Reference: [docs/dev/migration-metadata-checklist.md](docs/dev/migration-metadata-checklist.md)

- [ ] Not applicable (no migration in this PR)
- [ ] Summary of schema intent and affected objects
- [ ] Expand or contract classification
- [ ] Lock impact estimate with rationale
- [ ] Expected runtime estimate and cardinality assumptions
- [ ] Reversibility statement and rollback notes
- [ ] Backfill strategy documented (if data migration is required)
- [ ] Pre-merge validation completed (`upgrade head`, downgrade/upgrade path, object checks)
- [ ] Release preflight requirements acknowledged (revision, drift, connectivity, backup recency)
- [ ] Failure policy acknowledged (migration failure blocks rollout)
